title: alcea karsiana
intro: Alcea karsiana, also known as the Russian hollyhock or Alcea, is a perennial plant species within the mallow family (Malvaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alcea karsiana include reducing inflammation and pain, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. Alcea karsiana can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, making it a versatile herb for various herbal remedies.
